prompt: upbeat farmyard bluegrass, banjo + fiddle + hand claps, sunny and playful, kids' kart-racing game title screen, medium tempo, seamless loop, instrumental
notes: output_format mp3_44100 default (auto); 44.1kHz confirmed via frame header parse

prompt: composition_plan (music_v1, 4 sections, no vocals): A 'Groove' 25s driving banjo picking groove w/ steady bass+light drums -> B 'Fiddle Lead' 25s fiddle takes the lead melody, banjo backs off -> C 'Breakdown Build' 20s half-time, hand claps + spoons percussion, rising build -> A' 'Full Band Peak' 30s full band banjo+fiddle together, joyful climax resolving back into the opening groove riff for a seamless loop
notes: REPLACES the v1 single-loop-prompt track (was a repeating ~8-bar loop per user feedback). composition_plan.sections requires a 'lines' field per section even when empty ([]) - first call 422'd until added. Loop-edge energy check: start 65.56 / end 61.70 (ratio 0.94) - no hard fade at the seam.
